debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
⊢ |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|

proof:
simp [g', interpolated_deriv]
    rw [Finset.mul_sum]
    apply (Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _).trans
    simp_rw [abs_mul]
    exact Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i) (abs_nonneg _))
failed_attempts:
simp [g', interpolated_deriv]
    calc
      |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| ≤ ∑ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ = ∑ i, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by simp_rw [abs_mul]
      _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i) (abs_nonneg _))
      _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := Finset.mul_sum.symm

simp [g', interpolated_deriv]
    apply (abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _).trans
    rw [← Finset.mul_sum]
    exact Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => by
      rw [abs_mul, abs_sub_comm (y i) (x i)]
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (hdiff i) (abs_nonneg _))

      _ = ∑ i, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by simp_rw [abs_mul]
      _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i) (abs_nonneg _))
      _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := Finset.mul_sum.symm
